|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|

| CU-002 | 18 mo | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min | Responding well; weight gain improving |
| CU-003 | 51 mo | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27 |

**Quick take on PK stability:**  
- From the latest dosing file, I don’t see any obvious red flags in the PK-guided dosing parameters.  
- CU-001 and CU-002 look clinically stable/improving based on notes.  
- CU-003 appears appropriately set up for closer follow-up with the q2w schedule as a new enrollment.  
- That said, this reflects the latest **configured dosing parameters**, not live runtime diagnostics, so I can say the current parameter set looks consistent, but I haven’t independently verified live model performance from this file alone.

If you want, I can also format this into a short report/email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
